I was starting to get more and more used to the job, and as proof,
I was being left in charge by myself a lot.
Of course, I can always just call the manager if anything happens,
but being relied upon doesn't feel bad at all.
After all, with the probationary period over, they even raised my pay
a little bit. Nothing could motivate me more, if I do say so myself.
Maybe I should get ready to go and look for something
to buy for Shino.
Senpai
Alright, you're gonna be manning the place by yourself for a bit,
but feel completely free to just call the manager and throwing it all to him too.
Senpai
I'mma head out then~, see ya--!
Senpai
...Oh right, almost forgot. Take a look yourself later,
there's a pretty good-looking couple in that lounge right now.
After saying that, senpai left the store.
The couples' lounge, huh... maybe I will.
D
I sensed a presence, and a unique scent.
Beyond this point, full of faint sticky sounds...

...I could tell that a man and woman were doing it, just behind the
curtains, just as senpai mentioned.
They're just silhouettes, but considering it's my first time seeing such
sexual activity in person... I felt extremely excited.
Was the woman... sucking on the man's penis? The sound of it
made me imagine such a situation happening to myself, and...
my lower half swelled up on its own accord.
This is bad... I gotta get back to work...
Alright, that takes care of all the work that senpai mentioned. All that's
left now is to deal with the customers coming and going.
Thankfully, there's not that many customers around....
All that's left... is the couples' lounge....
I wonder what the couple back there is doing.
Hearing sounds different from before, I gulped hard.
Even I my virgin self could tell, what this sound and presence meant.
The two in there... are clearly having sex.
Losing control over my insatiable curiosity, I ended up watching the
pair through the curtain.

The pair inside was... doing exactly what I imagined they were.
Sounds echoed out, of flesh against flesh and fluids being churned.
The scent of sex, stronger than before, made my heart jump.
As I stared at them through the curtain,
an idea came to me.
Considering how engrossed the two inside were,
they didn't seem to notice me at all.
If so, would I really be caught... if I peeped on them directly for a bit?
I want to see the face of the cute girl too, the one that senpai
mentioned, the sort that'd do something like this in a place like this.
Even if I get caught, and get fired from this job, so be it.
I just can't resist the desire, after all....
With the side in my fingers, I was about to push the curtain aside when...
Shino's face appeared in my mind, and I stopped myself.
That's right, I'm working for her sake, not mine....
I can't ruin it all, over a momentary impulse like this.
blace
I shaked my head vigorously, trying to drive away all those evil thoughts,
and instead started cleaning the floor.
--I can see her face on her way out anyway.
Let's just make do with that.

Yo, \n[1]! I've been here ever since they announced the free attendance period~

The other day, I saw your wife come in here! She just doesn't fit in a place like this, 
you know~?
If you get a job here, you can read manga all day every day~
I just saw the staff drinking one of the free drinks just now without a care.
I'm so jealous of couples that come to places like these~
All the volumes except volume 5 of the book I want to read are here... what a pain...
